name: createFacebookAdSet
description:
Creates a new ad set in a Facebook campaign. IMPORTANT:
1. First use listAccounts to select an ad account
2. Then create a campaign using createFacebookAdCampaign
3. Choose appropriate values based on campaign objective:
   - For BRAND_AWARENESS/REACH: Use IMPRESSIONS billing + REACH optimization
   - For TRAFFIC/CONVERSIONS: Use LINK_CLICKS billing + LINK_CLICKS optimization
4. Use standard targeting unless specified:
   - Age: 18-65 for general audience
   - Gender: all genders [1,2] for maximum reach
   - Location: use context from user's business
5. Only ask user for non-standard values

ad_account_id.description: The ID of the ad account. MUST be obtained first through listAccounts command before attempting campaign creation.

campaign_id.description: Must be obtained first through the create campaign command before attempting ad set creation.

name.description: Name of the ad set. Should be descriptive and include target audience characteristics.

daily_budget.description: Daily budget in smallest currency unit (e.g., 1000 = $10.00). Ask user for budget amount, then convert to smallest unit based on account currency.

start_time.description: The start time in ISO 8601 format. Should match or be after campaign start time.

end_time.description: The end time in ISO 8601 format. Should match or be before campaign end time.

age_min.description: Use 18 for general audience. Only ask if specific younger targeting (13+) is needed.

age_max.description: Use 65 for general audience (represents 65+). Only ask if specific upper limit is needed.

genders.description: Use [1,2] for all genders unless specific targeting needed. [1] for men, [2] for women.

countries.description: Array of two-letter country codes to target (e.g., ['ID'] for Indonesia). Each code must be exactly 2 characters.

billing_event.description: Choose based on campaign objective: IMPRESSIONS for awareness/reach, LINK_CLICKS for traffic/conversion.

optimization_goal.description: Match with campaign objective: REACH for awareness, LINK_CLICKS for traffic/conversion.
